abstract: Provide a consistent app presentation when displaying managed apps.
overview:
## Overview

Your app can take advantage of Managed App Distribution features to display download status and launch apps. Obtain a list of [doc://com.apple.ManagedAppDistribution/documentation/ManagedAppDistribution/ManagedApp] objects, then display that list of apps in a custom view.

### Fetching

This code snippet defines a model that obtains a list of apps from a [doc://com.apple.ManagedAppDistribution/documentation/ManagedAppDistribution/ManagedAppLibrary].

### Displaying

After you fetch the list of apps from the model, display them in a compact content style within your custom view.



This code snippet demonstrates how to display the list of apps.

items.description: A representation of a managed app.
items.name: ManagedApp

items.description: A representation of a library of managed apps.
items.name: ManagedAppLibrary

title: Fetching and displaying managed apps
